required_params.name: condition_column
required_params.description: Column containing the condition values

required_params.name: baseline
required_params.description: The baseline value to compare against

optional_params.name: output_name
optional_params.description: Name for the output operation, defaults to 'pct_change_{condition_column}_vs_{baseline}' (optional)

outputs.description: Function that calculates percent change from an OperationsPipe.

PercentChange.description:
Compute the percent change (other - baseline) / baseline

Parameters:
-----------
condition_column : str
    Column containing the condition values
baseline : str
    The baseline value to compare against
output_name : str, optional
    Name for the output operation, defaults to 'pct_change_{condition_column}_vs_{baseline}'

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that calculates percent change from an OperationsPipe

CUPED.description:
Compute the absolute change adjusted using the CUPED approach

-----------

covariates : str or List[str]
    Column(s) to use as covariates for adjustment
stratified_by : str or List[str], optional
    Column(s) to stratify by when computing the adjustment
output_name : str, optional
    Name for the output operation, defaults to 'cuped_{condition_column}_vs_{baseline}'

--------
Callable
    Function that calculates CUPED adjustment from an OperationsPipe

Filter the data to include only specified conditions

    List of condition values to keep

required_params.name: condition_column
required_params.description: Column containing the condition values

required_params.name: baseline
required_params.description: The baseline value to compare against

required_params.name: metric_column
required_params.description: The metric to analyze

optional_params.name: output_name
optional_params.description: Name for the output operation, defaults to 'power_analysis_{metric_column}' (optional)

outputs.description: Function that performs power analysis from an OperationsPipe.

PowerAnalysis.description:
Perform power analysis to determine sample size requirements

Parameters:
-----------
condition_column : str
    Column containing the condition values
baseline : str
    The baseline value to compare against
metric_column : str
    The metric to analyze
alpha : float, default=0.05
    Significance level
power : float, default=0.8
    Desired statistical power
output_name : str, optional
    Name for the output operation, defaults to 'power_analysis_{metric_column}'

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that performs power analysis from an OperationsPipe

required_params.name: condition_column
required_params.description: Column containing the condition values

required_params.name: stratified_by
required_params.description: Column(s) to stratify by

optional_params.name: metrics
optional_params.description: List of metric columns to include (if None, all numeric columns are used) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_name
optional_params.description: Name for the output operation, defaults to 'stratified_summary' (optional)

outputs.description: Function that creates a stratified summary from an OperationsPipe.

StratifiedSummary.description:
Create a summary of metrics stratified by specified columns

Parameters:
-----------
condition_column : str
    Column containing the condition values
stratified_by : str or List[str]
    Column(s) to stratify by
metrics : List[str], optional
    List of metric columns to include (if None, all numeric columns are used)
output_name : str, optional
    Name for the output operation, defaults to 'stratified_summary'

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that creates a stratified summary from an OperationsPipe

required_params.name: condition_column
required_params.description: Column containing the condition values

required_params.name: baseline
required_params.description: The baseline value to compare against

required_params.name: metric_column
required_params.description: The metric to analyze

optional_params.name: n_bootstraps
optional_params.description: Number of bootstrap samples to generate (default: 1000)

optional_params.name: stratified_by
optional_params.description: Column(s) to stratify by when computing the intervals (optional)

optional_params.name: output_name
optional_params.description: Name for the output operation, defaults to 'bootstrap_ci_{metric_column}' (optional)

outputs.description: Function that calculates bootstrap CIs from an OperationsPipe.

BootstrapCI.description:
Calculate bootstrap confidence intervals for the difference in means

Parameters:
-----------
condition_column : str
    Column containing the condition values
baseline : str
    The baseline value to compare against
metric_column : str
    The metric to analyze
confidence : float, default=0.95
    Confidence level for the intervals
n_bootstraps : int, default=1000
    Number of bootstrap samples to generate
stratified_by : str or List[str], optional
    Column(s) to stratify by when computing the intervals
output_name : str, optional
    Name for the output operation, defaults to 'bootstrap_ci_{metric_column}'

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that calculates bootstrap CIs from an OperationsPipe

required_params.name: p_value_column
required_params.description: Column containing the p-values to adjust

optional_params.name: output_name
optional_params.description: Name for the output operation, defaults to 'adjusted_{method}' (optional)

outputs.description: Function that adjusts p-values from an OperationsPipe.

MultiComparisonAdjustment.description:
Apply multiple comparison adjustment to p-values

Parameters:
-----------
p_value_column : str
    Column containing the p-values to adjust
method : str, default='bonferroni'
    Method to use for adjustment ('bonferroni', 'fdr', 'sidak')
output_name : str, optional
    Name for the output operation, defaults to 'adjusted_{method}'

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that adjusts p-values from an OperationsPipe

ExecuteOperations.description:
Execute the operations pipeline and return all calculated operations

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that returns all operations from an OperationsPipe
